description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a before_script that runs yarn install --frozen-lockfile for all jobs. Define two stages: Test and Deploy. In the Test stage add a static job that runs yarn static-ci and a test job that runs yarn test-ci. In the Deploy stage add a deploy-test job that runs only on the master branch, sets the variable STAGE to test, runs yarn global add serverless then yarn deploy --no-confirm to perform a Serverless deployment, with no caches or artifacts defined.
